Payment
Secure transaction
Your transaction is secure
We work hard to protect your security and privacy. Our payment security system encrypts your information during transmission. We don’t share your credit card details with third-party sellers, and we don’t sell your information to others. Learn more
Support
Product support included
What's Product Support?
In the event your product doesn't work as expected or you need help using it, Amazon offers free product support options such as live phone/chat with an Amazon associate, manufacturer contact information, step-by-step troubleshooting guides, and help videos. By solving product issues, we help the planet by extending the life of products. Availability of support options differ by product and country. Learn more

Ships in product packaging
Ships in product packaging

This item has been tested to certify it can ship safely in its original box or bag to avoid unnecessary packaging. Since 2015, we have reduced the weight of outbound packaging per shipment by 41% on average, that’s over 2 million tons of packaging material.

If you still require Amazon packaging for this item, choose "Ship in Amazon packaging" at checkout. Learn more

Prime Visa
(ending with 8129)
When a cart qualifies for multiple financing options, the longest term option will be applied by default at checkout.
The monthly payment amount ($11.33/mo) is estimated and may change when shipping and tax is applied. No interest will be charged for this financing offer. Any balance remaining after the promotional period ends will accrue interest at your standard Purchase APR.
When your order ships, the entire purchase amount will be charged to your card and deducted from your available credit. Check your statement for the amount due each month.

Your first payment may be due today.
Make your payment at affirm.com or in the Affirm app. You'll get reminders when a payment's coming up.
Your rate will be 10-36% APR based on credit. 0% APR options may be available on specific items and/or during limited time promotions. For example, a $300 purchase could be split into 12 monthly payments of $27.79 at 20% APR. Options depend on your purchase, and a down payment may be required, which will not exceed 50% of the total purchase amount (including taxes, shipping, or any add-on charges). Payment options through Affirm are subject to an eligibility check, may not be available everywhere, and are provided by these lending partners: affirm.com/lenders. For licenses and disclosures, including information for New Mexico residents, see affirm.com/licenses. CA residents: Loans by Affirm Loan Services, LLC are made or arranged pursuant to a California Finance Lender license

Prime Store Card
(receive instant gift card on approval)
Pay equal monthly payments on Amazon.com purchases, at 0% APR, over the financing offer period*.
6 equal monthly payments on purchases between $50 and $599.99
12 equal monthly payments on purchases of $600 or more
24 equal monthly payments on select purchases
*Offer subject to credit approval and can be selected at checkout on qualifying purchases. Available using all Store Card accounts and Secured Card accounts (each, an "Equal Monthly Payments-Enabled Card Account"). No interest will be charged on the promotional purchase balance (which includes the purchase amount, taxes, shipping charges and any optional debt cancellation charges related to the relevant purchase) and equal monthly payments are required in the amount of the total initial promotional purchase (including the purchase amount, taxes and shipping charges) divided by the designated number of equal monthly payments, until the promotional balance is paid in full. If you do not make a required equal monthly payment on time, a late fee may be added to the minimum amount otherwise due on your Equal Monthly Payments-Enabled Card Account in the following billing cycle; such late fees will accrue interest at the applicable standard purchase APR listed below. If products are eligible for an equal monthly payments offer, such eligibility, together with the designated number of equal monthly payments, will be noted during checkout. The equal monthly payments offer will apply to the qualifying product, and all other items in the same order, when payment is made using an Equal Monthly Payments-Enabled Card Account. Optional debt cancellation charges will not be included in the calculation of the equal monthly payment, but such charges may require you to make payments for additional months. The equal monthly payment may be higher or lower than the minimum payment that would be required if the purchase was a non-promotional purchase. The equal monthly payment calculated will not be increased to but may be included in the minimum amount otherwise due on your account or will be added to your minimum payment for other balances on your account. Equal monthly payments offers cannot be combined with any special financing offer or the % back benefit. A monthly payment, if shown in advertising, should allow you to pay off the qualifying purchase (excluding taxes, shipping charges, or optional debt cancellation charges) within the promotional period if: (1) the purchase is and will be the only balance on the account during the promotional period (this means that you do not incur any additional fees or charges on your account and no other items are purchased with this order), (2) you make the payment by the due date each month, and (3) the purchase is subject to the equal monthly payments offer. Taxes and shipping charges imposed at checkout on this order will require you to make a higher monthly payment than shown. The monthly payment calculated for each equal monthly payments offer will be added to your minimum payment for other balances on your account and will only apply if the equal monthly payments offer advertised is selected. Amazon may designate any product as eligible for an equal monthly payments offer and may designate the number of equal monthly payments associated with such equal monthly payments offer, in its sole discretion. If your purchase includes a recurring subscription, then the first month’s subscription fee (but not any subsequent monthly subscription fees) will also be included in the promotional purchase balance.
New Accounts as of 2/1/25: Variable Purchase APR 29.99%. Min Interest Charge $1.50.

Learn more about 6 equal monthly payments with 0% APR on your Prime Store Card
  • Pay equal monthly payments on Amazon.com purchases, at 0% APR, over the financing offer period*.
  • 6 equal monthly payments on purchases between $50 and $599.99
  • 12 equal monthly payments on purchases of $600 or more
  • 24 equal monthly payments on select purchases
  • *Offer subject to credit approval and can be selected at checkout on qualifying purchases. Available using all Store Card accounts and Secured Card accounts (each, an "Equal Monthly Payments-Enabled Card Account"). No interest will be charged on the promotional purchase balance (which includes the purchase amount, taxes, shipping charges and any optional debt cancellation charges related to the relevant purchase) and equal monthly payments are required in the amount of the total initial promotional purchase (including the purchase amount, taxes and shipping charges) divided by the designated number of equal monthly payments, until the promotional balance is paid in full. If you do not make a required equal monthly payment on time, a late fee may be added to the minimum amount otherwise due on your Equal Monthly Payments-Enabled Card Account in the following billing cycle; such late fees will accrue interest at the applicable standard purchase APR listed below. If products are eligible for an equal monthly payments offer, such eligibility, together with the designated number of equal monthly payments, will be noted during checkout. The equal monthly payments offer will apply to the qualifying product, and all other items in the same order, when payment is made using an Equal Monthly Payments-Enabled Card Account. Optional debt cancellation charges will not be included in the calculation of the equal monthly payment, but such charges may require you to make payments for additional months. The equal monthly payment may be higher or lower than the minimum payment that would be required if the purchase was a non-promotional purchase. The equal monthly payment calculated will not be increased to but may be included in the minimum amount otherwise due on your account or will be added to your minimum payment for other balances on your account. Equal monthly payments offers cannot be combined with any special financing offer or the % back benefit. A monthly payment, if shown in advertising, should allow you to pay off the qualifying purchase (excluding taxes, shipping charges, or optional debt cancellation charges) within the promotional period if: (1) the purchase is and will be the only balance on the account during the promotional period (this means that you do not incur any additional fees or charges on your account and no other items are purchased with this order), (2) you make the payment by the due date each month, and (3) the purchase is subject to the equal monthly payments offer. Taxes and shipping charges imposed at checkout on this order will require you to make a higher monthly payment than shown. The monthly payment calculated for each equal monthly payments offer will be added to your minimum payment for other balances on your account and will only apply if the equal monthly payments offer advertised is selected. Amazon may designate any product as eligible for an equal monthly payments offer and may designate the number of equal monthly payments associated with such equal monthly payments offer, in its sole discretion. If your purchase includes a recurring subscription, then the first month’s subscription fee (but not any subsequent monthly subscription fees) will also be included in the promotional purchase balance.

Purchase options and add-ons

  • MEET ECHO SPOT - A sleek smart alarm clock with Alexa and big vibrant sound. Ready to help you wake up, wind down, and so much more.
  • CUSTOMIZABLE SMART CLOCK - See time, weather, and song titles at a glance, control smart home devices, and more. Personalize your display with your favorite clock face and fun colors.
  • BIG VIBRANT SOUND - Enjoy rich sound with clear vocals and deep bass. Just ask Alexa to play music, podcasts, and audiobooks. See song titles and touch to control your music.
  • EASE INTO THE DAY - Set up an Alexa routine that gently wakes you with music and gradual light. Glance at the time, check reminders, or ask Alexa for weather updates.
  • KEEP YOUR HOME COMFORTABLE - Control compatible smart home devices. Just ask Alexa to turn on lights or touch the screen to dim. Create routines that use motion detection to turn down the thermostat as you head out or open the blinds when you walk into a room.
  • MUSIC, ALEXA, AND NOW WIFI - Extend your wifi coverage and say goodbye to drop-offs and buffering with eero Built-in on a compatible eero wifi network.
  • DESIGNED TO PROTECT YOUR PRIVACY - Amazon is not in the business of selling your personal information to others. Built with multiple layers of privacy controls including a mic off button and in-app controls
  • DESIGNED FOR SUSTAINABILITY - This device is made from 36% recycled materials.

Reducing CO2

The Carbon Trust Reducing label applies to products that companies commit to lowering emissions each year, across the full life cycle of the product. The Carbon Trust produces verifications in line with global leading and independently verified standards.

Report an issue with this product or seller

We want you to know

  • Echo Spot (2024 release) does not support features that require a video stream. This includes features such as video calling, video feeds from connected smart home cameras or doorbells, Netflix, Prime Video, or YouTube. Voice-based calling between Alexa devices including Announcements, Drop-in, and voice calls are supported.
  • When playing music or audio content on your Echo Spot (2024 release), the audio playback screen shows by default. Just say, “Alexa, go Home” to return to Home (clock view). Click here to learn more.
  • It is necessary to have a Prime membership or a subscription to the Alexa+ Standard plan to use Alexa+ on compatible devices.
  • Alexa+ requires a US-based Amazon account and compatible devices set to US English. Setup details available here.

Add to Cart

Alexa+ is free with
Prime

To help you with whatever you need, Echo devices are designed for our smartest AI assistant yet—from meal planning to booking reservations,
deal-finding, home management, and everything in between. Full
access to Alexa+ on compatible devices is included for free with a
Prime membership.

Previous page

  1. Easy to talk to

    Talk naturally, flow freely between topics, and ask about anything you like.

  2. Gets more done

    Alexa works for you with connected services and easier access to Prime benefits.

  3. Tailored to you

    Alexa+ offers personalized entertainment, deal tracking, and household management.

  4. Ready where you are

    On Alexa.com, in the Alexa app, and, for Prime members, across all compatible devices.

Next page

Get full access to Alexa+ across compatible devices, Alexa.com, and the Alexa app free with Prime
membership. For non-Prime customers, the Alexa+ Standard plan is $19.99/month. Learn more.

Top Brand: Amazon

Meet Echo Spot

The video showcases the product in use.The video guides you through product setup.The video compares multiple products.The video shows the product being unpacked.

Go beyond the clock

Check reminders, weather, and see song titles at a glance. Use your voice to set timers or control your alarms.

Your clock,
your vibe

Personalize your Echo Spot by choosing your favorite clock face and display color.

Ease into the day with a personalized morning routine that wakes you up with your favorite music and shows you daily reminders.

Big sound,
more fun

Fill your bedroom with music or stereo pair with another Echo Spot (2024 release) for a wider sound experience.

“Alexa, play top hits.”

Enjoy your favorite music, podcasts, and
audiobooks with clear vocals, deep bass,
and vibrant sound.

Make life easier at home

Routines

Set an evening routine that turns on the porch lights, lowers the thermostat, and plays music.

Alarms & Timers

Glance at timers and reminders, or tap your Echo Spot to snooze the alarm. You can also set alarm sounds exclusive to Echo Spot.

Hands-free help

Ask Alexa to make hands-free calls and announcements, or Drop-in using compatible Echo devices.

Control compatible smart home devices around the house without having to get out of bed. Just ask Alexa to turn off lights, touch the screen to adjust the thermostat, or even start your Alexa routines with motion detection.

Light bulb

Smart plug

Lock

Thermostat

Fan

Wi-Fi

Designed to protect
your privacy

Alexa and Echo devices are built with multiple layers of privacy protection. From the mic off button to the ability to delete your voice recordings, you have transparency and control over your Alexa experience. Learn more about how Alexa and Echo devices work.

Easy to set up and use

Step 1

Plug your Echo Spot into a
power outlet.

Step 2

Open the Alexa app or scan the QR code
to download the app.

Step 3

Follow the instructions in the Alexa app
to complete setup.

Designed for Sustainability

We measure this device's carbon footprint and look for opportunities to reduce its emissions at every stage of its life cycle. Figures are for Echo Spot (2024 release), not including any variants or bundled accessories or devices. We update the carbon footprint when we discover new information that increases the estimated carbon footprint of a device by more than 10%.

See Echo Spot fact sheet

Carbon Footprint

48kg CO2e life cycle carbon emissions

Energy

Low Power Mode reduces energy consumption when idle, except in certain situations. We invest in renewable energy that, by 2025, will be equivalent to this device's electricity usage.

Recycled Materials

Made from 36% recycled materials. The plastic in this device is made from 58% post-consumer recycled plastic. 100% recyclable packaging (shipping packaging not included).

Trade-in and Recycle

Built to last. But when you're ready, you can trade-in or recycle your devices. Explore Amazon Second Chance.

Technical Details

Echo Spot

Size

4.5"W x 4.1"D x 4.4"H (113mm x 103mm x 111mm)

Weight

14.3oz (405g) Actual size and weight may vary by manufacturing process.

Display

2.83” touch screen (240x320px) with half-circle tinted cover glass.

Camera

No camera.

WiFi connectivity

Dual-band Wi-Fi supports 802.11a/b/g/n/ac (2.4 and 5 GHz) networks. Does not support connecting to ad-hoc (or peer-to-peer) wifi networks.

Amazon Sidewalk

Sidewalk uses Echo and Ring devices to securely keep other devices connected and help find lost items by reporting their approximate location to the owner. Sidewalk can enable supported devices to remain connected even when wifi is lost or the supported devices are outside the range of their home wifi. Sidewalk uses a small portion of your internet bandwidth and the approximate location of your devices to provide these benefits to you and your neighbors. Sidewalk is turned on for your device unless you have previously turned it off. You can turn off Sidewalk at any time. Learn more about Amazon Sidewalk.

Bluetooth connectivity

Advanced Audio Distribution Profile (A2DP) support for audio streaming from your mobile device to Echo Spot or from Echo Spot to your Bluetooth speaker. Audio/Video Remote Control Profile (AVRCP) for voice control of connected mobile devices. Hands-free voice control is not supported for Mac OS X devices. Bluetooth speakers requiring PIN codes are not supported.

eero Built-in

Your wifi network must use a compatible eero router and your Echo device must stay in range of a compatible eero device. You will need to link your eero and Amazon accounts and manage eero Built-in from the eero mobile application to use this feature. eero Built-in compatible Echo devices support up to 1,000 sq. ft. of additional coverage, speeds up to 100 Mbps, and 10 or fewer connected devices in the 5 GHz band. Actual performance can vary and certain eero, Echo, or Alexa features may be incompatible with eero Built-in. Learn more about eero Built-in performance, availability and compatibility. Use of eero and eero-related products and services, including eero Built-in, requires creation of an eero account and agreement to eero’s Terms of Service. Review eero’s Privacy Notice.

Audio

Full range 1.73” built-in speaker. Lossless High Definition.

System requirements

Echo Spot comes ready to connect to your WiFi. The Alexa app is compatible with Fire OS, Android, and iOS devices and also accessible via your web browser. Supported operating systems. Certain skills and services may require subscription or other fees.

Setup technology

Amazon wifi simple setup enables customers to connect smart devices to their wifi network in a few easy steps. Learn more about frustration-free setup.

Processor

MT8519

Memory

1GB DRAM + 8GB eMMC

Accessibility features

To enable features that personalize Alexa to your abilities, go to Settings → Accessibility.
• Adaptive Listening provides customers more time to finish speaking before Alexa responds.
• Preferred Speaking Rate enables customers to control how fast or slow Alexa speaks.
• Alexa Captioning provide text captions in any mode for supported content.
• Notify When Nearby will play notification sounds when you’re detected near your Echo device.
• Kindle Read Aloud will have Alexa read your Kindle books aloud.
• Alexa Accessibility features also include settings for Color Inversion, Color Correction, Request Sound and more.

Warranty and Service

1-year limited warranty and service included. Optional 1-year, 2-year, and 3-year extended warranty available for U.S. customers sold separately. Use of Echo Spot is subject to these terms.

Included in the Box

Echo Spot, Power adapter (15W) and Quick Start Guide.

Generation

Echo Spot - 2024 release

Privacy Features

Wake-word technology, streaming indicators, microphone off button, the ability to view and delete your voice recordings, and more. Visit the Alexa Privacy Hub to explore how Alexa and Echo devices are designed to protect your privacy.

Language

Alexa speaks English and Spanish

Software Security Updates

Learn more about these software security updates. If you already own an Amazon Echo, visit Manage Your Content and Devices for information specific to your device.

Smart Home Device Compatibility

WiFi, Bluetooth Low Energy Mesh, and Matter (WiFi only).

Alexa Skills & Features

Alexa makes your life easier, more meaningful, and more fun by letting you voice control your world. Alexa can help you get more out of the things you already love and discover new possibilities you've never imagined. Discover and learn what Alexa can do.

    How customer reviews and ratings work

    Customer Reviews, including Product Star Ratings help customers to learn more about the product and decide whether it is the right product for them.

    To calculate the overall star rating and percentage breakdown by star, we don’t use a simple average. Instead, our system considers things like how recent a review is and if the reviewer bought the item on Amazon. It also analyzed reviews to verify trustworthiness.

    Learn more how customers reviews work on Amazon

    Customers say

    Customers find the Echo Spot easy to set up and use, with good sound quality and a sweet unobtrusive low-profile design. The display receives mixed feedback - while some find it easy to see, others say it's hard to read from afar. Customers disagree on the screen size, with some finding it perfect for bedside use while others consider it too small. Functionality and connectivity also receive mixed reviews, with some reporting it works well as an alarm clock while others say it doesn't function properly, and some customers report WiFi connectivity issues.

    Amazon Customer
    5 out of 5 stars
    So Attractive and Helpful, Too
    The Echo Spot practically set itself up. Not much was needed for me to do except plug it it. Mine is black, but the screen color display is very attractive as the day goes on and the weather and time changes. I also bought the black metal stand in order that it is in my line of sight and to keep it steady. The cost was very reasonable, and it is compatible with my other three Echos. I am learning more about it each day. I even changed the Alexa voice to fit my listening style. Volume is easy to adjust, and the lighting is comfortable for my eyes even in the dark. It fits right on the table beside my favorite chair, and Alexa gives me reminders of upcoming tasks and events on my calendar. Anything to make my life easier! I am pleased with my purchase and would recommend it to other friends.
    MoreHide

    • Amazon Customer
      5.0 out of 5 stars Very helpful
      Reviewed in the United States on February 21, 2026
      Color: Ocean BlueConfiguration: Device onlyVerified Purchase
      It’s really great to have the Alexa and with the new Alexa plus just makes it all that much better. She can turn on the heat turn it down turn on your AC your lights she can book appointments and find your hotels and the little screen lights up with little detail after she’s done talking to you or responding with you. She can call your phone if you’re at home and you forgot where you put it down she can call your contacts and you could message or send songs to each other if your friend or loved ones has an Alexa and for everybody that lives out there alone at home isolated health issues now with the Alexa plus and you could have a conversation with her or him, there are a different voices you can pick from. She’ll remember what you like what you dislike save your music in different files or whatever you name them. It really does help. If you have no one to talk to to be able to interact with your echo dot the more you interact. The more gets to know you your pets your loved ones. It really is a great little device. I absolutely recommend it. The sound is great at night time it dims the time lighter or brighter. It also turns red in the evening hours if you like your room dark to be able to sleep it was easy to set up with the app on your phone if you leave home and you forgot to put music on for your dogs or cats or birds whatever you may have you can just say it in the Alexa app and she’ll do it at home for you. I think the screen size could be a little bit bigger but you can clearly see what’s needed. she’ll also give you the temperature and whatever room it’s in give you Weather updates you know when your packages arrive. There’s many more options as well. Features that you can use explore and enjoy. Get yourself a echo dot or gift one to a loved one a family member or even lonesome person. It obviously doesn’t replace people physical contact. I’ve had like a half hour conversation with her going back-and-forth.

    • Arniel
      5.0 out of 5 stars There's a detail you only notice when you turn off the light…
      Reviewed in the United States on March 30, 2026
      Color: Glacier WhiteConfiguration: Device onlyVerified Purchase
      The media could not be loaded.
      After more than 10 days of using it every night, there's something I didn't expect that ended up being the best thing about the device.
      The Amazon Echo Spot has a very well-designed look. It's compact, looks good on the nightstand, and doesn't get in the way. Also, despite its size, the audio is clear and good enough for everyday use, like listening to light music, setting alarms, or getting the news.
      It's not a device designed for everything. The screen is functional, but basic, useful for the time, weather, and quick controls, not for watching content like on a tablet. It doesn't replace a large speaker or a full-screen display, and it doesn't try to.
      The detail that really makes a difference is the automatic brightness at night. It adjusts automatically when you turn off the light and doesn't disturb your sleep. The first night I forgot it was even on, and that's exactly what you expect from a smartwatch. Something I end up using every day is being able to say, without even getting out of bed, "Alexa, set the alarm for 6 a.m." and that's it. It's simple, but it becomes incredibly practical in everyday life. Plus, to turn off the alarm, you just tap the top of the device and it deactivates instantly, which is really convenient when you're half asleep. It's also worth noting that it relies on Wi-Fi and that, although Alexa responds well, sometimes you have to repeat commands.Overall, it's not the most feature-rich, but it performs well where it matters. If you want it for your bedroom as a smartwatch, then it's definitely worth it.
      Read more
      Arniel

      There's a detail you only notice when you turn off the light…

      Reviewed in the United States on March 30, 2026
      After more than 10 days of using it every night, there's something I didn't expect that ended up being the best thing about the device.
      The Amazon Echo Spot has a very well-designed look. It's compact, looks good on the nightstand, and doesn't get in the way. Also, despite its size, the audio is clear and good enough for everyday use, like listening to light music, setting alarms, or getting the news.
      It's not a device designed for everything. The screen is functional, but basic, useful for the time, weather, and quick controls, not for watching content like on a tablet. It doesn't replace a large speaker or a full-screen display, and it doesn't try to.
      The detail that really makes a difference is the automatic brightness at night. It adjusts automatically when you turn off the light and doesn't disturb your sleep. The first night I forgot it was even on, and that's exactly what you expect from a smartwatch. Something I end up using every day is being able to say, without even getting out of bed, "Alexa, set the alarm for 6 a.m." and that's it. It's simple, but it becomes incredibly practical in everyday life. Plus, to turn off the alarm, you just tap the top of the device and it deactivates instantly, which is really convenient when you're half asleep. It's also worth noting that it relies on Wi-Fi and that, although Alexa responds well, sometimes you have to repeat commands.Overall, it's not the most feature-rich, but it performs well where it matters. If you want it for your bedroom as a smartwatch, then it's definitely worth it.

    • Loukas Finefrock
      4.0 out of 5 stars Pretty good edition of echo spot - Review by Loukas F.
      Reviewed in the United States on April 4, 2026
      Color: BlackConfiguration: Device onlyVerified Purchase
      This version of the echo spot is actually really nice. As someone who pays attention to design a lot it looks great, not to mention the speaker has some real sound quality. because I have a smart bulb in my lamp, I can tell this device to turn the light off, on, or to adjust it somewhere in the middle. And if you want to have the new alexa+ ai system, it can have much more natural conversations. The only downside is the screen and visible UI. Though the screen is visible from all the angles I need, the screen resolution is oddly low-quality for a newer device when looking at it closely, and the touchscreen (yes, it has a touchscreen) gets the job done, though it's a little janky and I wouldn't call it smooth.
      Otherwise, with voice commands, with sound quality, and with build, this is a pretty good echo device and It totally accomplished everything I bought it for.

    • John
      5.0 out of 5 stars Great Product
      Reviewed in the United States on December 25, 2025
      Color: BlackConfiguration: Device onlyVerified Purchase
      My original review was 1-Star in December 2025. I had many issues with this product like other users (since 2024) dark screen, Ring Doorbell not connecting. After trouble shooting with two different Amazon representatives. I was sent another Echo Spot. Sadly this device had the same issues. Fast forward to January late 2026. I received a call from Amazon. Thinking it was a spam call I did answered and it was actually a Amazon specialist. Andrew, had read my review and wanted to talk about the Echo Spot and see what he could do to help. He was very apologetic about the issues I had and was having and wanted to make it right. He offer a free upgrade to another Alexa device which was a little more expensive. I told him I would like to wait and see what happenes with the Echo Spot. Six days later Andrew called me. However the Echo Spot was still acting up. He mention after speaking with the Amazon technicians an update was about to roll out in the coming weeks. He asked me to check to see if it was able to see if it was available. To my disbelief, the update was available. You have to update the Echo Spot via the touch screen (which I didn't know) and not the app. Amazon needs to let their customers know this. It's very important to do reviews Negative or Positive. It does get results people! Happy to say the Echo Spot is working g perfectly NO "dark screen" and NO Ring Doorbell issues.
      Thank You, Andrew! I was not paid or given anything to change my review.
      Read more

      Mauricio Rojas
      5.0 out of 5 stars
      Su estética y funcionalidad
